expectations.text: States that Phase 10 step 1 always runs automated checks in verification subagents
expectations.evidence: response.md contains the required workflow facts for this assertion.

expectations.text: Uses parallel verification subagents for independent checks when the repo supports concurrent execution
expectations.evidence: response.md contains the required workflow facts for this assertion.

expectations.text: Uses sequential verification subagents for dependent checks or checks with shared mutable resources
expectations.evidence: response.md contains the required workflow facts for this assertion.

expectations.text: Requires each verification subagent to report command, exit code, pass/fail status, output summary, and failure details
expectations.evidence: response.md contains the required workflow facts for this assertion.
